questions.subject: pharmaceutics
questions.question: Tablets question 1: What is a key purpose of a tablet disintegrant?
options: Promote breakup of the tablet after administration
questions.correctAnswer: Promote breakup of the tablet after administration
questions.explanation: Disintegrants facilitate breakup of the tablet into smaller fragments, which supports dissolution and drug release.
